implementationNotes: Draft PR #20 created — awaiting Terraform plan

items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote: Updated infra/api-specs/api-sample.openapi.yaml: added /profile path with GET (operationId: getProfile) and PATCH (operationId: updateProfile) operations. GET returns UserProfile (id uuid, displayName, email, theme enum). PATCH accepts ProfileUpdate body (displayName, theme) and returns merged UserProfile. Responses: 200, 400 (PATCH only), 401. No new Terraform resources created — APIM picks up the new operations via the existing api-sample import block. Existing dual-mode auth policies already support PATCH method.

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
items.docNote: Added integration tests for GET /profile (200 auth, 401 unauth) and PATCH /profile (200 valid, 400 bad theme/short name, 401 unauth) to smoke.integration.test.ts. Tests obtain a demo token via /auth/login beforeAll, then exercise all profile endpoint auth and validation paths.

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
items.docNote: Added /profile page (profile/page.tsx) with GET/PATCH profile API integration via apiFetch, display name + theme editing form with loading/error/success states. Added Profile nav link to NavBarShell (affects both Demo and Entra variants). E2E tests cover happy path, 400 error interception, and nav link visibility.

errorLog.message: Elevated apply resume cycle 1/5. Reset 2 items to pending for standard CI re-verification.
